args.query: SELECT gmap_id, COUNT(*) AS high_rating_review_count FROM review WHERE rating >= 4.5 AND time LIKE '2019%' GROUP BY gmap_id ORDER BY high_rating_review_count DESC LIMIT 3;

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, COUNT(*) AS high_rating_review_count FROM review WHERE rating >= 4.5 AND time LIKE '2019%' GROUP BY gmap_id ORDER BY high_rating_review_count DESC LIMIT 3;

result.preview: [{"name": "Aurora Massage", "gmap_id": "gmap_20"}, {"name": "The Boochyard @ Local Roots", "gmap_id": "gmap_53"}, {"name": "Widows Peak Salon", "gmap_id": "gmap_40"}]

args.query: SELECT name, gmap_id FROM business_description WHERE gmap_id IN ('gmap_20', 'gmap_53', 'gmap_40');

exec_args.sql: SELECT name, gmap_id FROM business_description WHERE gmap_id IN ('gmap_20', 'gmap_53', 'gmap_40');

result.preview: [{"name": "Aurora Massage", "high_rating_review_count": "8"}, {"name": "The Boochyard @ Local Roots", "high_rating_review_count": "7"}, {"name": "Widows Peak Salon", "high_rating_review_count": "6"}]

args.code:
import pandas as pd

review_counts = [{"gmap_id": "gmap_20", "high_rating_review_count": "8"}, {"gmap_id": "gmap_53", "high_rating_review_count": "7"}, {"gmap_id": "gmap_40", "high_rating_review_count": "6"}]
business_names = [{"name": "Aurora Massage", "gmap_id": "gmap_20"}, {"name": "The Boochyard @ Local Roots", "gmap_id": "gmap_53"}, {"name": "Widows Peak Salon", "gmap_id": "gmap_40"}]

df_reviews = pd.DataFrame(review_counts)
df_businesses = pd.DataFrame(business_names)

merged_df = pd.merge(df_reviews, df_businesses, on='gmap_id')
result = merged_df[['name', 'high_rating_review_count']].to_json(orient='records')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)

import pandas as pd

review_counts = [{"gmap_id": "gmap_20", "high_rating_review_count": "8"}, {"gmap_id": "gmap_53", "high_rating_review_count": "7"}, {"gmap_id": "gmap_40", "high_rating_review_count": "6"}]
business_names = [{"name": "Aurora Massage", "gmap_id": "gmap_20"}, {"name": "The Boochyard @ Local Roots", "gmap_id": "gmap_53"}, {"name": "Widows Peak Salon", "gmap_id": "gmap_40"}]

df_reviews = pd.DataFrame(review_counts)
df_businesses = pd.DataFrame(business_names)

merged_df = pd.merge(df_reviews, df_businesses, on='gmap_id')
result = merged_df[['name', 'high_rating_review_count']].to_json(orient='records')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)

result.preview: "Aurora Massage: 8 high-rating reviews\nThe Boochyard @ Local Roots: 7 high-rating reviews\nWidows Peak Salon: 6 high-rating reviews"
